name: California-Mexican Garden Salsa
recipeIngredient: 3 large ripe tomatoes; seeded and coarsely chopped
1 small cucumber; peeled, seeded and coarsely chopped
1 small carrot; peeled and finely shredded
2 jalapeno peppers; seeded and finely chopped
2 tablespoons fresh thyme (preferably lemon thyme); minced
2 tablespoons balsamic vinegar or red wine vinegar
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large nonreactive bowl, mix all ingredients together.
2. Cover and refrigerate until chilled about 1 hour.
Judi's Note: I always add 2 cloves of garlic (minced) to this recipe for a tangier salsa.
